prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: normal enemy portrait set for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate enemy portrait sheet with six distinct normal enemy portraits for a fantasy match-3 roguelike. Subject: six bust portraits in a 3x2 sheet: Striker agile blade raider, Defender heavy shield guard, Charger horned brute, Ruin Lancer spear fighter, Vault Executioner armored axe enemy, Goldbound Keeper treasure-guardian enemy. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game portrait art, dark-fantasy adventure, crisp silhouettes, mobile HUD readable. Composition/framing: 3x2 portrait sheet, each enemy centered in its cell, consistent scale and camera angle, simple dark neutral backdrop, no labels. Lighting/mood: threatening but not horror, cool dungeon shadows with warm rim highlights. Color palette: charcoal stone, blackened steel, antique gold accents, distinct accent color per enemy. Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no copyrighted characters, no casino imagery, keep each silhouette distinct.
